prose.en: Protect against unauthorized physical connections at {param:sc-07.14_odp}.

guidance.en: Systems that operate at different security categories or classification levels may share common physical and environmental controls, since the systems may share space within the same facilities. In practice, it is possible that these separate systems may share common equipment rooms, wiring closets, and cable distribution paths. Protection against unauthorized physical connections can be achieved by using clearly identified and physically separated cable trays, connection frames, and patch panels for each side of managed interfaces with physical access controls that enforce limited authorized access to these items.

prose.en: {param:sc-07.14_odp} are protected against unauthorized physical connections.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
facility communications and wiring diagram system security plan
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
organizational personnel with boundary protection responsibilities
Mechanisms supporting and/or implementing protection against unauthorized physical connections

guidelines.en: managed interfaces to be protected against unauthorized physical connections are defined;
